data.content:
# Patterns

Event Modeling only uses 4 patterns and 5 Key Elements.

### State Change

Typically a screen, a command and and event

OR

an automation, a command and an event

### State View

One or several Events connected to a Read Model

### Automation

Just a combination of State View ( TODO List ) and a State Change.

### Translation

Translate Information from one lane to a different one.




[The Model in Miro](https://miro.com/app/board/uXjVKvTN_NQ=/)
Use the feedback Lane to add meaningful information.

## Missing Data

Feedback can also mean, data is missing, then mark it ref.

data.title: event
data.description: Events are facts that already happened. They are immutable.

data.title: command
data.description: Commands are instructions to the system. A succesful command execution results in one or several Events

data.title: read model
data.description: Read Models are based on Events and show, how information is used in the system

data.content:
# Information Completeness

If you connect two elements, the system  checks for information completeness. 

a red arrow indicates, information is missing.

Technically, the system checks for every field if it is clearly defined, where the information is coming from.

scenarios.title: Order can be submitted only once
